tasks.subject: Task 1: ImageDetail seams + smoke test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ImageDetailActivity.getIntent and a real Refresh-icon contentDescription, then a smoke test asserting the error-state icon is displayed.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/ImageDetailActivity.kt (add getIntent(Context, HttpUrl): Intent; navigateTo delegates)
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/ImageDetailScreen.kt (Refresh Icon contentDescription null -> stringResource(R.string.error_action_retry))
- Create: src/androidTest/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/ImageDetailScreenTest.kt (1 smoke)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- getIntent(context,url) returns intent with URL_EXTRA and navigateTo delegates
- Refresh Icon contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.error_action_retry)
- test asserts Refresh icon displayed by content description after load fails
- test passes on API 31 AVD

**Verify:** ./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=me.proxer.app.ui.ImageDetailScreenTest -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL, 1 test, 0 failures.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/ImageDetailActivity.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/ImageDetailScreen.kt", "src/androidTest/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/ImageDetailScreenTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=me.proxer.app.ui.ImageDetailScreenTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getIntent(context,url) returns intent with URL_EXTRA and navigateTo delegates", "Refresh Icon contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.error_action_retry)", "test asserts Refresh icon displayed by content description after load fails", "test passes on API 31 AVD"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Manga reader testTag seam + smoke test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a testTag to the Manga reader containers, then a smoke test that stubs a valid empty-pages chapter and asserts the reader container is displayed after the happy path hides all chrome.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/manga/MangaScreen.kt (add internal const val MANGA_READER_TEST_TAG = "mangaReader" + testTag import; apply .testTag(MANGA_READER_TEST_TAG) to both LazyColumn and HorizontalPager reader containers)
- Create: src/androidTest/kotlin/me/proxer/app/manga/MangaScreenTest.kt (1 smoke)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- MangaScreen.kt declares internal const val MANGA_READER_TEST_TAG = "mangaReader"
- both LazyColumn (vertical) and HorizontalPager (horizontal) carry .testTag(MANGA_READER_TEST_TAG)
- test launches Manga via bare Intent, stubs entryCore(-1)+chapter(-1,1,ENGLISH) pages=emptyList, asserts mangaReader displayed
- test passes on API 31 AVD

**Verify:** ./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=me.proxer.app.manga.MangaScreenTest -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL, 1 test, 0 failures.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/manga/MangaScreen.kt", "src/androidTest/kotlin/me/proxer/app/manga/MangaScreenTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=me.proxer.app.manga.MangaScreenTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MANGA_READER_TEST_TAG const declared", "both LazyColumn and HorizontalPager carry .testTag(MANGA_READER_TEST_TAG)", "test stubs entryCore(-1)+chapter(-1,1,ENGLISH) pages=emptyList and asserts mangaReader displayed", "test passes on API 31 AVD"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Anime smoke + deep tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two Anime tests in one file — an empty-state smoke test (reuses emptyList() streams stub, asserts error_no_data_anime) and a populated deep test (builds AnimeStream, asserts Text(hosterName)). No production seam.

**Files:**
- Create: src/androidTest/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/AnimeScreenTest.kt (2 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- launches Anime via bare Intent, stubbing entryCore(-1) + streams(-1, 1, AnimeLanguage.ENGLISH_SUB)
- smoke test stubs streams = emptyList() and asserts R.string.error_no_data_anime displayed
- deep test stubs streams = [AnimeStream] (resolutionResult=null) and asserts hosterName Text displayed
- neither test taps Play
- both tests pass on API 31 AVD

**Verify:** ./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=me.proxer.app.anime.AnimeScreenTest -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL, 2 tests, 0 failures.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/androidTest/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/AnimeScreenTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=me.proxer.app.anime.AnimeScreenTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bare-Intent launch stubs entryCore(-1)+streams(-1,1,ENGLISH_SUB)", "smoke asserts error_no_data_anime with emptyList streams", "deep builds AnimeStream (resolutionResult=null) and asserts hosterName Text", "neither taps Play", "both pass on API 31 AVD"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Full-suite verification (62 tests)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run the entire instrumented suite and confirm 62 tests pass (58 existing + 4 new), recording the wall-clock delta against Group 4's ~63s baseline.

**Files:** none (verification only).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest reports Starting 62 tests, 0 failed
- wall-clock recorded and compared to ~63s Group 4 baseline
- TV stateless-content tests (TvSearchScreenTest et al.) among the passing tests

**Verify:** ./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL, Starting 62 tests, 0 failed.

If a happy-path test surfaces a first-frame data!! NPE (like Group 3 ConferenceInfoScreen), STOP and escalate to user before changing src/main.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Starting 62 tests, 0 failed", "wall-clock recorded vs ~63s baseline", "TV tests among passing set"]}
```
